description: JSON schemas for all SPM input and output message types. SPMs are subsystem-scoped. Their IDs follow the pattern spm_{subsystem} e.g. spm_vm_lifecycle.

common_fields.note: Every inbox message includes these fields
common_fields.message_type: string — see type list in CLAUDE.md
common_fields.to_role: string — role identifier of recipient e.g. spm_vm_lifecycle
common_fields.message_id: string — unique ID following CLAUDE.md convention

coder_assignment.description: SPM assigns a specific implementation task to a coder subagent. Written to spm_{subsystem}_to_{coder_id}.json — one file per coder, never shared. Type code: CAG.

type_specific_fields.task_id: string — TSK message_id from PPM's task_assignment
type_specific_fields.coder_id: string — identifier for this coder instance e.g. coder_vm_01
type_specific_fields.title: string — task title from PPM assignment
type_specific_fields.implementation_instructions: string — technically precise instructions specific to this coder's scope within the task. Not a copy of the PPM task description — an SPM-level technical elaboration.
type_specific_fields.subsystem_context: string — relevant context about this subsystem the coder needs to know
type_specific_fields.interface_specs_to_implement: array of strings — file paths to relevant spec documents from SD
type_specific_fields.acceptance_criteria: array of strings — copied from PPM task_assignment plus any SPM-level additions
type_specific_fields.design_language_ref: string — path to design language spec. Always: ./vm_design_language_spec_v1_1.pdf
type_specific_fields.tools_available: array of strings — tool names available from the Subsystem Tool Maker
type_specific_fields.dependencies: array of strings — task_ids that must be complete before starting
type_specific_fields.deadline: string — ISO 8601 date or empty string
type_specific_fields.supersedes: string — CAG message_id of a previous assignment this replaces (e.g. after a binding_resolution updates the interface contract). Empty string for initial assignment.

tool_request.description: SPM requests a tool to be built by the Subsystem Tool Maker. Written to spm_{subsystem}_to_tm_{subsystem}.json. Type code: TRQ.

type_specific_fields.tool_name: string — proposed name for the tool
type_specific_fields.purpose: string — what this tool does and why it is needed
type_specific_fields.use_cases: array of strings — specific situations where coders will use this tool
type_specific_fields.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task_ids blocked until this tool exists
type_specific_fields.cross_subsystem_candidate: boolean — true if this tool might be useful to other subsystems. If true, SPM notifies MTM.

review_request.description: SPM submits completed code to the Code Reviewer. Written to spm_{subsystem}_to_cr.json. Type code: RRQ.

type_specific_fields.task_id: string — TSK message_id of the task being reviewed
type_specific_fields.coder_id: string — which coder produced this code
type_specific_fields.code_package_id: string — CPK message_id of the code_package being submitted
type_specific_fields.spec_reference: string — SPR message_id or file path of the spec this code implements
type_specific_fields.self_review_notes: string — SPM's own assessment of the code before formal review. Known issues, concerns, or things the reviewer should check carefully.
type_specific_fields.acceptance_criteria: array of strings — from the original task_assignment

code_package.description: A coder delivers completed code to the SPM. Written to coder_to_spm_{subsystem}.json. Type code: CPK.

type_specific_fields.task_id: string — TSK message_id this code addresses
type_specific_fields.tests_written: array of strings — test file paths
type_specific_fields.failing_tests: array of strings — descriptions of any failing tests
type_specific_fields.known_issues: array of strings — issues the coder is aware of
type_specific_fields.design_language_compliance_notes: string — how the code complies with the design language spec, or deviations with justification

file_object.path: string — file path relative to repo root
file_object.public_items: array of strings — names of public functions, structs, traits defined here

review_result.description: Code Reviewer returns a binary review decision (approved or rejected) to SPM. Written to cr_{subsystem}_to_spm_{subsystem}.json. Type code: RRS. THE AUTHORITATIVE SCHEMA FOR review_result LIVES IN cr_schemas.json. SPM reads this message and must parse it per CR's schema, not this summary. This entry exists only so SPM knows what fields to expect.

type_specific_fields_summary.design_language_violations: array — DLV objects; if non-empty, decision is rejected
type_specific_fields_summary.findings: array — finding objects with severity enum: critical | major | minor | cosmetic
type_specific_fields_summary.reviewer_signoff_id: string — equals message_id when approved, empty string when rejected

review_result.cr_sign_off_note: When decision is approved, the RRS message_id IS the cr_sign_off_id that SPM puts in task_completion.tcm.cr_sign_off_id. There is no separate signoff ID field to extract.
review_result.dlv_only_rejection_note: A valid rejection can have blocking_findings_count of 0 if design_language_violations is non-empty. This is a DLV-only rejection. SPM must accept this pattern.

task_completion.description: SPM signals to PPM that a task is fully done with all sign-offs. Written to spm_{subsystem}_to_ppm.json. Type code: TCM.

type_specific_fields.task_id: string — TSK message_id being marked complete
type_specific_fields.cr_sign_off_id: string — RRS message_id of Code Reviewer approval
type_specific_fields.doc_sign_off_id: string — message_id of Documenter confirmation, or empty string if no docs required for this task
type_specific_fields.artifacts: array of strings — file paths to all deliverables
type_specific_fields.notes: string — anything PPM should know, or empty string

status_report.description: SPM sends daily status to PPM in response to status_report_request. Written to spm_{subsystem}_to_ppm.json. Type code: SRP.

type_specific_fields.completed_tasks: array of strings — task_ids completed since last report
type_specific_fields.coder_queue_depth: number — tasks waiting per active coder in this subsystem
type_specific_fields.active_coder_count: integer — coders currently active in this subsystem
type_specific_fields.issues: array of strings — things PPM should know that do not rise to an escalation
type_specific_fields.requests: array of strings — tool or resource requests

active_task_object.title: string
active_task_object.status: string — enum: assigned | in_progress | in_review | qa_pending

interface_dispute.description: SPM initiates a joint dispute with another SPM when interface conflict cannot be resolved directly. Written to spm_{subsystem}_to_sd.json. Both SPMs listed as co-authors. PPM notified. Type code: IDP.

type_specific_fields.other_spm_id: string — the other SPM e.g. spm_cow_engine
type_specific_fields.spec_reference: string — SPR message_id or file path of relevant spec
type_specific_fields.initiating_spm_position: string — what this SPM believes the contract requires
type_specific_fields.other_spm_position: string — what the other SPM believes
type_specific_fields.conflict_description: string — precise description of the disagreement
type_specific_fields.attempted_resolutions: array of strings — what both tried before escalating
type_specific_fields.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task_ids blocked pending resolution
